title: lycopus europaeus subsp. menthifolius
intro: Lycopus europaeus subsp. menthifolius, also known as European water horehound, is a subspecies of the Lycopus europaeus plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of European water horehound include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. European water horehound can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
